PostToolUse.description: Check file count guardrail after any file modification
PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'MODIFIED=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l); STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l); TOTAL=$((MODIFIED + STAGED)); if [ "$TOTAL" -gt 5 ]; then echo "⚠️ GUARDRAIL: $TOTAL files modified (limit: 5). Run /scope to break this down."; fi'

PostToolUse.description: Run go vet after writing Go files
PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'if git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q "\.go$"; then go vet ./... 2>&1 || echo "⚠️ go vet found issues"; fi'

PostResponse.description: TDD reminder when Go files change without test files
PostResponse.command: bash -c 'NEW_GO=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep "\.go$" | grep -v "_test.go" || true); NEW_TESTS=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep "_test.go" || true); if [ -n "$NEW_GO" ] && [ -z "$NEW_TESTS" ]; then echo "📝 TDD Reminder: Go files were modified but no test files changed. Tests come first!"; fi'
